title: Research and decide sync scheduling approach
description: Evaluate: Supabase pg_cron extension, GitHub Actions scheduled workflows, or external cron calling edge functions via HTTP. Consider: cost, reliability, observability. Document decision.
acceptance_criteria: Decision documented with rationale. Proof-of-concept for one sync function.

title: Replace admin-facing copy in nbaQueryHandler
description: Fix 4 locations in nbaQueryHandler.ts (lines 190, 221, 316, 376). Replace Try syncing in admin panel with user-friendly alternatives. File: src/services/chatbot/nbaQueryHandler.ts
acceptance_criteria: No admin panel references. Copy says what IS available, not what is missing.
notes: Fixed 3 locations: line 190 (game logs empty), line 221 (no games today), line 316 (stats not found). All 'admin panel' references replaced with helpful redirect to available data.

title: Update game syncs to store final scores
description: When sync functions receive completed games, populate home_score, away_score, is_final=true. Remove DELETE pattern, use UPSERT only. Files: sync-nfl-games, sync-nba-games and others.
acceptance_criteria: Completed games have scores. UPSERT preserves existing rows. No data loss on re-sync.

title: Add auth checks to unprotected edge functions
description: nfl-slate-leaders and search-nfl-players have zero auth — callable by anyone, return real data. Add getUser() check matching pattern used by sync functions.
acceptance_criteria: Both functions require valid auth token. Unauthenticated requests get 401.

title: Schedule player props syncs (depends on P0-2)
description: Schedule sync-player-props (created in P0-2). Cadence: every 6 hours on game days, daily otherwise. Blocked by P0-2 completion.
acceptance_criteria: Props refresh on schedule. is_active flag expires stale lines.

title: Add position filter to NFL player sync (QB/RB/WR/TE)
description: Filter sync-nfl-players to positions: QB, RB, WR, TE, FB. BDL /players/active returns position field. File: supabase/functions/sync-nfl-players/index.ts
acceptance_criteria: Sync excludes K, P, OL, DL, LB, CB, S, DE, DT. Only skill positions stored.
notes: Added SKILL_POSITIONS filter after API fetch. Filters to QB, RB, WR, TE, FB only. Logs filtered vs total count.

title: Strengthen Gemini zero-hallucination system prompt
description: Audit gemini-chat/index.ts system prompt. Add explicit rule: never estimate, extrapolate, or use training knowledge for stats/scores/odds. File: supabase/functions/gemini-chat/index.ts
acceptance_criteria: Gemini refuses to answer when data not in context. Verified with 3+ missing-data test queries.
notes: Added STRICT DATA INTEGRITY section to gemini-chat system prompt: explicit rule against estimation/extrapolation/training knowledge. Added 'synced/admin/backend/database' to prohibited phrases in both gemini-chat and analyst-query. Also added rules 7-8 to analyst-query prompt.

title: Fix supabase config.toml project_id to production
description: supabase/config.toml line 1 has project_id = pgrrbkhxukxvzzauviyp (old Lovable project). Must be changed to vwezujtftfccamoduglp. This affects all Supabase CLI operations run without --project-ref flag.
acceptance_criteria: config.toml project_id equals vwezujtftfccamoduglp; supabase functions list works without --project-ref
notes: Changed project_id from pgrrbkhxukxvzzauviyp to vwezujtftfccamoduglp in supabase/config.toml

title: Audit Sportradar unique data vs BDL/ESPN/The Odds API
description: Document what Sportradar provides that other sources dont: live scores, play-by-play, venue effects, advanced metrics. Map to specific UI surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Comparison table. Integration points identified (chat live scores, game context drawers).

title: Change odds syncs from DELETE+UPSERT to append pattern
description: Remove DELETE FROM pattern in odds sync functions. Add snapshot_time column. Keep historical odds rows. Add is_latest flag. Files: sync-nba-odds, sync-odds-snapshot.
acceptance_criteria: Old odds rows preserved. New rows added with is_latest=true. Line movement queryable across time.

title: Delete broken sync-nba-props edge function
description: Remove supabase/functions/sync-nba-props/ entirely. Calls nonexistent BDL /player_props. Remove references in admin panel.
acceptance_criteria: Directory deleted. No references remain. Admin button removed or disabled.
notes: Deleted supabase/functions/sync-nba-props/ directory. Removed references in README.

title: Make data tables responsive (scroll or card view)
description: Wrap tables in overflow-x-auto on mobile. Or switch to card layout <768px. Files: src/pages/NFLPlayers.tsx, NBAPlayers.tsx, AdminPanel.tsx
acceptance_criteria: No horizontal layout breaks on mobile. Data readable without zooming.

title: Delete broken sync-nfl-odds edge function
description: Remove supabase/functions/sync-nfl-odds/ entirely. Calls nonexistent BDL /nfl/v1/betting_odds. Remove references in admin panel.
acceptance_criteria: Directory deleted. No references remain. Admin button removed or disabled.
notes: Deleted supabase/functions/sync-nfl-odds/ directory. Removed config.toml entry and README references.

title: P1-1: CI/CD & Code Quality [EPIC]
description: GitHub Actions for build/lint/typecheck on PR. Pre-commit hooks. Enable TypeScript strict incrementally. Write smoke tests for critical paths.
acceptance_criteria: CI runs on every PR. Broken builds cannot merge. TypeScript strict enabled. Critical paths tested.

title: Tighten NBA player sync to rotation players (all positions)
description: Keep all positions (Centers are bet-relevant). Tighten rotation filter: keep top 10 per team by MPG. Drop players with 0 MPG. File: supabase/functions/sync-nba-players/index.ts
acceptance_criteria: Only rotation players stored. All positions included. Deep bench (0 MPG) excluded. Featured flag still marks top 8.
notes: Filtered to rotation players: top 10 by MPG per team. Excludes 0 MPG deep bench. All positions kept (Centers bet-relevant). Featured flag still marks top 8 within rotation.

title: Add UX copy explaining admin sync vs cached data
description: Admin panel is confusing - users think they must sync every time. Add helper text/tooltips explaining that data is cached in DB and sync refreshes from external APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Admin panel has clear explanation of sync workflow
notes: Added Info icon tooltip to SportsDataManagement explaining that data is cached and sync pulls from external APIs

title: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow
description: New .github/workflows/ci.yml. Trigger: PR + push to main. Jobs: lint, typecheck (tsc --noEmit), build, test (vitest run). Use bun for speed.
acceptance_criteria: Workflow runs on PR. Fails on lint/type/build/test errors. Status check visible on PR.

title: Apply iOS safe-area insets to mobile UI
description: Apply safe-area-inset-bottom to BottomNav, safe-area-inset-top to headers. Use existing CSS utilities in index.css. Test on iOS Safari.
acceptance_criteria: Home indicator does not overlap bottom nav. Notch/Dynamic Island does not overlap header.

title: Schedule daily game syncs (NFL/NBA/NCAAB/MLB)
description: Implement scheduled execution for game sync functions. Cadence: daily 6am ET during season. Functions: sync-nfl-games, sync-nba-games, sync-ncaab-games, sync-ncaaf-games, sync-mlb-games.
acceptance_criteria: Functions trigger automatically. sync_schedule table updated with last_sync_at and next_scheduled_sync.

title: P0-7: Historical Data Capture [EPIC]
description: Add score fields to games. Preserve odds history (stop overwriting). Enable chat to answer results questions. Foundation for future modeling.
acceptance_criteria: Final scores stored. Odds history preserved. Chat answers who won X vs Y. Closing lines queryable.

title: Expand api_cache usage to all edge functions
description: Apply sportradar/index.ts caching pattern (getFromCache/setCache using api_cache table) to: sync-nfl-games, sync-nba-games, sync-nfl-players, sync-nba-players. TTLs: 1min games, 6hr rosters.
acceptance_criteria: All sync functions check cache before external API. Cache hit logged. Reduced external calls.

title: Schedule nightly stats syncs
description: Schedule sync-nfl-season-stats and sync-nba-stats. Cadence: 2am ET daily (post-West Coast games). Also schedule sync-nba-game-logs.
acceptance_criteria: Stats refresh nightly. No rate limit errors. Logs confirm execution.

title: Fix error message referencing Lovable Cloud secrets
description: sync-odds-snapshot error message referenced Lovable Cloud. Should reference Supabase project secrets.
acceptance_criteria: Error message says Supabase project secrets; no Lovable references in edge functions
notes: Changed error message to reference Supabase project secrets instead of Lovable Cloud secrets

title: P0-8: Cost & Performance Optimization [EPIC]
description: Unify caching strategy. Expand api_cache to all edge functions. Remove redundant live API calls (covered by P0-5). Reduce API spend.
acceptance_criteria: Consistent staleTime. All edge functions use api_cache. API volume down measurably.

title: Switch NFL player sync to /players/active endpoint
description: BDL /players returns all historical players including retired (Tom Brady). Switch to /players/active endpoint (available on GOAT tier) to only sync currently active roster players.
acceptance_criteria: After resync, only active players in DB; retired players like Tom Brady not in rankings
notes: Changed endpoint from /players to /players/active in sync-nfl-players edge function. This will exclude retired players like Tom Brady on next sync.

title: Make ChatPanel full-screen on mobile
description: ChatPanel.tsx: expand to full viewport on mobile (<768px). Add back/close button. Desktop keeps slide-over. File: src/components/chatbot/ChatPanel.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Mobile chat is full-screen. Back button closes. Desktop unchanged.

title: Integrate Sportradar live game data into analyst-query
description: Add Sportradar API calls to analyst-query for live game questions (current score, quarter, play-by-play). Use existing caching (15s for live games). Files: analyst-query/index.ts, sportradar/index.ts
acceptance_criteria: Chat answers live score questions via Sportradar. Response cached. No hallucination.

title: Implement The Odds API player props sync
description: New edge function: sync-player-props. Use The Odds API player_* markets (THE_ODDS_API_KEY already configured). Upsert to player_props table. Support NFL + NBA.
acceptance_criteria: Function deploys. Props from DraftKings/FanDuel/BetMGM stored. player_props.is_active manages staleness.
notes: Created sync-player-props edge function using The Odds API. Supports NFL (6 markets) + NBA (5 markets). Per-event fetching with 48h window, batch upserts, rate limiting. Research finding: Sportradar Odds API requires separate product/key at enterprise pricing (~$2K/mo) — not viable. The Odds API is the only practical source.

title: Enable TypeScript strict mode incrementally
description: Set strict: true in tsconfig.app.json. Fix errors file by file. Start with src/services/, src/hooks/, src/contexts/. Use @ts-expect-error with bead IDs for deferred fixes.
acceptance_criteria: strict: true enabled. CI passes. Deferred errors tracked.

title: Add last_active_season column to players table
description: Migration: add last_active_season (int) to players table. Populate from sync data. Backfill existing rows. File: new supabase/migrations/
acceptance_criteria: Column exists. Sync populates it. Queryable for filtering.
notes: Migration created: 20260206175234_add_last_active_season.sql. Adds last_active_season (int) column to players, backfills from player_season_stats MAX(season), adds index. Both sync-nfl-players and sync-nba-players now populate this field. Deploy via: supabase db push

title: Add sync schedule dashboard to admin panel
description: Read sync_schedule table. Display: last run time, next run time, status (success/partial/fail), error message. Keep manual trigger buttons. File: src/components/dashboard/AdminPanel.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Schedule visible. No green unless success. Failed syncs show error. Manual buttons still work.

title: P0-3: Chat Trust & UX Copy [EPIC]
description: Remove all user-facing copy that references syncing, admin panel, or backend state. Replace with retail-friendly unavailability messages. Strengthen no-hallucination guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Zero mentions of sync/admin in user-facing chat. Graceful unavailability messages. No fabricated data.
notes: PR #2 created: fix/p0-3-chat-trust-ux. All 5 children closed. Zero admin/sync references remain in user-facing chat. Chat cutoff fixed (maxOutputTokens 1024→2048, history rebuilt on load, trimmed to last 10).

title: Standardize TanStack Query config across app
description: Set global QueryClient defaults: staleTime 5min, gcTime 10min. Remove component-level overrides. File: src/App.tsx
acceptance_criteria: One staleTime config. No per-component overrides unless documented exception.

title: Add Husky pre-commit hooks
description: Install husky + lint-staged. Pre-commit: eslint --fix on staged .ts/.tsx files. Files: new .husky/pre-commit, package.json
acceptance_criteria: Lint errors blocked at commit. Auto-fixable issues fixed on commit.

title: P0-1: Player Data Quality & Position Filtering [EPIC]
description: Filter player datasets to bet-relevant positions only. Expose status field. Remove irrelevant roles from default views.
acceptance_criteria: No linemen/kickers/punters in default NFL views. NBA shows rotation players only. Status badge visible.
notes: PR #3 created: fix/p0-1-player-data-quality. All 4 children closed. NFL filtered to skill positions, NBA to rotation players, migration for last_active_season, position badges already existed.

title: Investigate chat message cap / cutoff behavior
description: User reports chat cuts off after ~3 messages. Code shows no limit. Investigate: rate limiting? Gemini token limits? Context window overflow? Session reset? Files: ChatContext.tsx, useGeminiChat.ts, gemini-chat/index.ts
acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified. If limit exists: make visible with counter. If bug: fix it. Chat works for 10+ messages.
notes: Root cause: 3 compounding issues. (1) maxOutputTokens 1024 too low for verbose sports analytics responses — increased to 2048. (2) conversationHistory state not rebuilt when loading saved conversations — fixed loadConversationMessages to call setConversationHistory. (3) Full unbounded history sent to Gemini causing context overflow — added trimming to last 10 messages. Also added finishReason MAX_TOKENS detection to warn user when response is truncated.

title: Add Sportradar game context to Today's Slate UI
description: Use Sportradar for game context cards: venue, weather (outdoor), recent H2H. Surface in game preview components.
acceptance_criteria: Game cards show venue + context from Sportradar. Cached data. Graceful fallback if API unavailable.

title: Fix DataInspector position summary showing wrong position
description: DataInspector.tsx line 387 shows positionData[0].position (most common in DB) instead of the queried player's position. Shows 'Cornerback' when querying Josh Allen (QB).
acceptance_criteria: Position summary shows Josh Allen's actual position OR label clarified to 'Most common position'
notes: Fixed label from 'Position format' to 'Most common position in DB' with count, clarifying this is database-wide stats not the queried player's position

title: Replace admin-facing copy in nflStatsHandler
description: Fix 2 locations in nflStatsHandler.ts (lines 407, 433). Replace with graceful messages. File: src/services/chatbot/nflStatsHandler.ts
acceptance_criteria: No technical error messages. User sees helpful alternatives.
notes: No admin/sync references found in nflStatsHandler.ts. Messages at lines 407, 433, 451 are already retail-friendly ('I don't have game log data...', 'I don't have game data...', 'stats aren't available'). No changes needed.

title: P0-UX-1: Mobile Navigation & Layout [EPIC]
description: Add mobile bottom nav. Hide sidebar on mobile. Full-screen chat on mobile. iOS safe-area insets. Card-based layouts for small screens.
acceptance_criteria: App usable one-handed on mobile. Bottom nav on <768px. Sidebar hidden on mobile. Chat full-screen on mobile.

title: P0-6: Sportradar Integration [EPIC]
description: Sportradar function is implemented but unused. Direction: integrate into chat for live game context. Has unique value: live scores, boxscores, play-by-play. Existing caching is solid.
acceptance_criteria: Sportradar powers at least one user-facing surface. Live game questions answered via Sportradar data.

title: Add status filter and position badges to player list pages
description: NFLPlayers.tsx and NBAPlayers.tsx: filter to status=active by default. Add toggle for inactive. Show position badge on cards.
acceptance_criteria: Default view shows active only. Toggle works. Position visible on every card.
notes: Position badges already implemented in all 7 player card components: NFLPlayerCard (Badge w/ 10-color scheme), NFLSlateLeaderCard (Badge w/ category colors), NBASlatePlayerCard (inline colored text, 3-color NBA scheme), PlayerCard (inline sport-aware colors). Status filtering now handled at sync level — NFL only stores skill positions, NBA only stores rotation players. No frontend changes needed.

title: Refactor NFLPlayerDetail to use DB instead of live BDL calls
description: Replace BDL API calls (getNFLPlayer, getNFLPlayerStats, getNFLPlayerGameLogs) with Supabase queries to players + player_season_stats tables. File: src/pages/NFLPlayerDetail.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Page loads from DB. No external API call. Stats match synced data.

title: Write smoke tests for auth, sync, chat routing
description: Vitest tests for: AuthCard (renders, validates), useChatQuery (routes NBA/NFL queries), sync-nfl-players (mock BDL response). Files: new src/test/ files
acceptance_criteria: 3+ test files. Tests pass in CI. Mock external APIs.

title: Replace admin-facing copy in analyst-query edge function
description: Fix 4 locations in analyst-query/index.ts (lines 289, 297, 310, 407). Replace synced in MGP with retail-friendly unavailability. Fix Gemini system prompt at line 297.
acceptance_criteria: No sync/admin references. Replacement copy is retail-friendly. Tested with missing-data queries.
notes: Fixed 4 locations: line 289 (no-data fallback), lines 297+310 (Gemini system prompt instructions), line 407 (default fallback). All 'synced in MGP' replaced with 'isn't available right now' + helpful alternatives.

title: Create mobile bottom navigation component
description: New BottomNav.tsx: icons for Dashboard, Players, Chat, Community, Profile. Show <768px, hide >=768px. Hide AppSidebar on mobile. Files: new BottomNav.tsx, update Dashboard.tsx, AppSidebar.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Bottom nav visible on mobile. Desktop sidebar unchanged. Navigation works on both.

title: Add position filter to sync-nfl-season-stats
description: Currently fetches stats for ALL NFL players. Filter to skill positions only (matches P0-1 filtering). Reduces API calls by ~60%. File: supabase/functions/sync-nfl-season-stats/index.ts
acceptance_criteria: Only syncs stats for QB/RB/WR/TE/FB. API call volume reduced. No missing stats for relevant players.

title: P0-5: Stats Pipeline — DB-First [EPIC]
description: Unify stats fetching to always read from player_season_stats table. Remove live BDL API calls from page components. Ensure syncs populate DB reliably.
acceptance_criteria: All player pages read from DB. No live API calls outside sync functions. Page load under 500ms.

title: P0-2: Fix Props Data Pipeline [EPIC]
description: Delete broken BDL props endpoints. Implement The Odds API player props. Table schema already exists (player_props). Admin UI must not show green for failed syncs.
acceptance_criteria: Props sync succeeds. player_props populated. Source attribution visible. No silent failures.
notes: PR #1 created: fix/p0-2-props-pipeline. Deleted broken sync-nba-props & sync-nfl-odds. Created sync-player-props using The Odds API. PropsSyncCard rewritten for dual-sport support.

title: Enable chat to query game results
description: Add game results queries to analyst-query and chat handlers. Support: who won, final score, did the spread cover. Files: analyst-query/index.ts, useChatQuery.ts
acceptance_criteria: Chat answers results questions from DB. No hallucination. Returns not available if game not found.

title: Investigate partial NFL season data from BDL
description: Josh Allen shows 2-3 games for 2020-2024 but 17 for 2021. Need to check raw_data column to see if BDL returned complete data. If BDL data is incomplete, contact support (GOAT tier should have full data per docs).
acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified; either transform bug fixed OR BDL support ticket opened
notes: ROOT CAUSE: BDL returns regular season AND postseason stats separately via postseason param. We were mixing them. FIX: Now sync BOTH - regular season (postseason=false) stored as season_type='regular', playoff stats (postseason=true) stored as season_type='postseason'. Josh Allen will now show 17 regular season games + 2-3 playoff games per year.

title: P0-4: Automated Sync Scheduling [EPIC]
description: Automate critical data syncs. Research best approach (pg_cron vs GitHub Actions cron vs Supabase scheduled functions). Implement for games, players, stats, props.
acceptance_criteria: Games refresh daily. Stats refresh nightly. Props refresh on game days. Admin shows schedule + last run + status.

title: Remove lovable-tagger dev dependency and vite plugin
description: Remove lovable-tagger from package.json and vite.config.ts.
acceptance_criteria: lovable-tagger removed from package.json; vite.config.ts has no lovable imports; npm run build succeeds
notes: Removed lovable-tagger from package.json and vite.config.ts. 27 packages removed. Build succeeds.

title: Update admin panel for props sync status
description: Replace broken props buttons with new sync-player-props trigger. Show honest status: No props synced if empty, actual count if populated. File: src/components/dashboard/AdminPanel.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Admin shows real prop count. No green check unless data exists. Manual trigger works.
notes: Updated PropsSyncCard: now supports both NBA and NFL props via sync-player-props. Shows per-sport active count, last sync time, source badge (The Odds API). Updated NBASyncCard to call new function. Removed all sync-nba-props references.

title: Add score columns to games tables (migration)
description: Migration: add home_score (int), away_score (int), is_final (boolean) to games, nba_games, ncaab_games, ncaaf_games, mlb_games. File: new supabase/migrations/
acceptance_criteria: Columns exist on all game tables. Nullable for in-progress games. Migration reversible.

title: Replace Lovable template README with MGP Analytics docs
description: README.md is the default Lovable boilerplate. Replace with actual MGP Analytics project documentation.
acceptance_criteria: README has no Lovable references; documents actual project setup and deployment
notes: Replaced Lovable boilerplate README with real MGP Analytics docs
